description: Perform a quarterly catalog cleanup for Urban Electronics using the Drupal Commerce admin interface (http://localhost/admin/commerce/products; credentials: admin / Admin1234!). Discontinue 'Bose QuietComfort 45' and 'Anker PowerCore 26800' by setting their status to Unpublished. Update 'Nintendo Switch OLED' by changing its title to 'Nintendo Switch OLED [CLEARANCE]' and its price to $279.99. Change the 'LG 34" UltraWide Monitor' product variation SKU to 'LG-34UW-V2'. Ensure no other products are modified.
